content:
Overall, you’ve done a great job, and with just a few small adjustments, your application materials will be even more polished. Keep up the great work!

Best,
Professor Padavano

⸻

Letter for Alexandre Boulet

Dear Alexandre,

Thank you for submitting your resume and cover letter. You have a strong foundation, and your materials reflect your passion for anesthesiology. Below are my thoughts on each.

Your cover letter does a great job of expressing your enthusiasm for the University of Miami’s anesthesiology program. It’s professional, well-structured, and clearly written. One thing to revise is the formatting—there’s a repetition of the recipient’s address, which isn’t necessary. Additionally, while you provide a solid overview of your interest, you could strengthen your letter by highlighting specific experiences or skills that make you a standout candidate.

Your resume is well-organized and provides a clear picture of your background. Your objective statement is strong, and your education details are well-placed. One area for improvement is your experience section—since you are still in high school, it’s understandable that your work experience may be limited, but you can still emphasize any relevant academic projects, research, or volunteer work in more detail. Also, your skills section could be expanded to include more technical or medical-related skills to better align with your career goals.
context: From document: Feedback Letters for Resume & Cover Letters — chunk 4 (chunk 4/22)
